title: veronica derwentiana subsp. anisodonta
intro: Veronica derwentiana subsp. anisodonta, also known as the Alpine Speedwell, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Veronicaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, allowing it to be applied topically to treat wounds and skin irritations. The Alpine Speedwell is also known to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Veronica derwentiana subsp. anisodonta plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
